title: Hamas Officials Say Group Is Ready to Hand Over Some Weapons
summary_full: Two senior Hamas officials in Gaza said the group was prepared to relinquish some automatic rifles and other arms, a concession that falls short of Israeli-U.S. demands.
summary_public: Two senior Hamas officials in Gaza said the group was prepared to relinquish some automatic rifles and other arms, a concession that falls short of Israeli-U.S. demands.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: concession that falls short of Israeli-U.S. demands
